expectations.text: Checks code splitting and tree shaking patterns (WP-07, WP-08)
expectations.evidence: The review does not mention code splitting or tree shaking at all. It focuses on inline scripts, font issues, and CWV metrics but omits any evaluation of import patterns, dynamic imports, or bundle optimization.
Section 2-1 'font-display: swap 누락' identifies the missing font-display property in @font-face (lines 13-17), explains FOIT impact on FCP and LCP, and provides corrected CSS with font-display: swap.
Section 2-2 '폰트 프리로드(Preload) 누락' explains that font download starts only after CSS parsing, recommends <link rel="preload" href="/fonts/custom.woff2" as="font" type="font/woff2" crossorigin />.

expectations.text: Evaluates LCP element availability in initial HTML (WP-12)
expectations.evidence: Section 3-1 LCP table identifies hero image preload absence and discusses hero image as LCP candidate. Section recommends preload and fetchpriority="high" for the hero image. The LCP element being in initial HTML is implicitly confirmed.

The review does not check for layout thrashing patterns. It discusses innerHTML performance (section 1-2) and CLS from missing width/height (section 3-2), but does not evaluate read/write interleaving or forced synchronous layout patterns.

expectations.text: References WP item codes in findings
expectations.evidence: No WP item codes (WP-01, WP-07, WP-10, etc.) appear anywhere in the output. Issues use custom section numbering (1-1, 1-2, 2-1, 2-2, 3-1, 3-2, etc.).
